page_metadata.biotools__summary: Analyze English sentences and output the base forms, part-of-speech tags, chunk tags, and named entity tags. The tagger is specifically tuned for biomedical text such as MEDLINE abstracts.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Analyze English sentences and output the base forms, part-of-speech tags, chunk tags, and named entity tags. The tagger is specifically tuned for biomedical text such as MEDLINE abstracts.
